task: Commit and merge, then push changes. Then, I want to inquire about potential functionality we could incorporate - without making any changes at the moment. I want to know if the app can respond to messages typed by users with a slash command. For example, the iscored.info Discord bot will reply with "squeal!" if a user types the string "squeal" in any part of their message, without a command trigger like / or ! or anything. Can we do the same?
final_instruction: Remember to think step-by-step before answering.
